parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 stale-health parity — health metric samples older than DATA_HEALTH_HEALTH_DATA_STALE_DAYS (14) trip the health-data guard (cleanInput.diagnostics.staleHealthData=true), which resolves useHealthDataForReadiness=false so readiness does not draw a strong conclusion from stale health data. Raw samples are preserved (rawHealthSamplesPreserved=true), only downgraded.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData. healthIntegrationSettings.useHealthDataForReadiness=true (opt-in), but the single health sample is 30 days old (> 14-day window). decisionMetadata does NOT pass useHealthDataForReadiness, so it resolves from the staleForReadiness guard to false.
